examples: Regius Professorships were created in the past when a university chair was founded or endowed by a royal patron.
Professor Eileen Scanlon of the educational technology department has been awarded a Regius Professorship in Open Education by the Queen.
It is one of 12 in the UK, including the music department at the Royal Holloway, in Egham, to have the title of Regius Professor bestowed upon it.
